Module 4 - Straight Line Customer Funnel
This module is all about funnels. Funnels are essentially a way of increasing the value of each
and every customer. Ultimately, the objective is to increase customer value so that we can be
better positioned to spend more money on acquiring customers than our competitors can.
This module is imperative to your success as a marketer.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com
